results.check_summary: Alternating arithmetic streams replay the prefix.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE: odd terms increase by 4; even terms decrease by 2.

results.check_summary: Mostly -3 deltas with triangular-position jumps replay the prefix.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK: -3 steps with jumps at triangular boundaries.

results.check_summary: Growing negative blocks and scheduled positive jumps fit the prefix.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK with negative step magnitudes increasing by 4.

results.check_summary: Three-phase affine recurrence exactly replays the prefix.
Finite-difference continuation from the terminal prefix.
Periodic phase deltas inferred from repeated terminal behavior.
results.rule_summary: PDELTA with phase-specific recurring polynomial deltas.

results.check_summary: Constant third differences replay the cubic sequence.
results.rule_summary: POLY cubic; successive second differences decrease by 5.

results.check_summary: Periodic modular/affine continuation inferred from the prefix.
Two interleaved streams have arithmetic second-difference patterns.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE: odd and even subsequences use quadratic increments.

results.check_summary: Three residue-class streams replay the prefix.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE: linear stream, powers-of-two alternating stream, and quadratic-difference stream.

results.check_summary: Alternating affine biases fit the terminal recurrence pattern.
results.rule_summary: AFFINE with alternating phase biases of increasing magnitude.
